acceptance_criteria_covered: Claimed voicemail remains in Mine with indicators
Unclaimed voicemail remains in Inbox with labeling
Voicemail-only events do not reset escalation/inactivity timers
Closed-thread inbound voice does not auto-reopen and routes to fallback
Claimed voicemail remains visible in Mine with indicator
Unclaimed voicemail remains in Inbox with voicemail-received labeling
Voicemail-only events preserve escalation and inactivity timer surfaces
Closed-thread inbound voice retains CLOSED state and fallback behavior
